title: Improved Fletching
description: Adds custom arrows and an additional purpose to the fletching table!
body:
# Improved Fletching

Improved Fletching is a simple mod that allows the fletching table to be used as a sort of crafting table-esque block. Alongside this addition, I have added four custom arrow types that can be crafted exclusively using the fletching table: magma, carrot, quartz, and honey-dipped.



- Magma Arrow: An Alternative to the "flame" enchantment that sets enemies ablaze.
- 
- Carrot Arrow: An alternative to bonemeal that skips a random amount of growth when shot at a crop.
- 
- Quartz Arrow: An alternative to instant-damage arrows that does additional damage.
- 
- Honey-Dipped Arrow: An alternative to slowness-two arrows that slow targets down.



This is a very lightweight mod that currently takes up 56 KB of space to download. I will be actively updating this mod as new versions come out, similar to my [Note Block Charged](https://modrinth.com/mod/noteblockcharged) Mod.

### Requires Fabric API to run

### Special thanks to u/PowerPork for the idea and the arrow textures!
